# uapi_mwan3_interface (Data Source)

Look up the mwan3 interface.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_mwan3_interface" "example" {
  id = "<id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `check_quality` (Boolean) uci option check_quality.
- `down` (Number) uci option down.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the entry is active.
- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state.
- `failure_interval` (Number) uci option failure_interval.
- `failure_latency` (Number) uci option failure_latency.
- `failure_loss` (Number) uci option failure_loss.
- `family` (String) Address family: any, ipv4, or ipv6.
- `flush_conntrack` (List of String) uci option flush_conntrack.
- `interval` (Number) uci option interval.
- `keep_failure_interval` (Boolean) uci option keep_failure_interval.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `max_ttl` (Number) uci option max_ttl.
- `probe_count` (Number) Probes per cycle per track_ip.
- `recovery_interval` (Number) uci option recovery_interval.
- `recovery_latency` (Number) uci option recovery_latency.
- `recovery_loss` (Number) uci option recovery_loss.
- `reliability` (Number) uci option reliability.
- `size` (Number) uci option size.
- `timeout` (Number) uci option timeout.
- `track_ip` (List of String) uci option track_ip.
- `track_method` (String) uci option track_method.
- `up` (Number) uci option up.
